hypothesis: On GER40 M15 during European cash session, a close beyond the 20-bar Donchian channel by >=0.5*ATR with ADX rising above 20 captures directional momentum, delivering PF>=2.0 with trailing ATR stop over 200+ trades.

entry_rules.long: close > donchian_high(20)[1] AND (close - donchian_high(20)[1]) >= 0.5 * atr(14) AND adx(14) > 20
entry_rules.short: close < donchian_low(20)[1] AND (donchian_low(20)[1] - close) >= 0.5 * atr(14) AND adx(14) > 20

exit_rules.trailing_stop: chandelier: highest_high(10) - 2.5*atr(14) (long) / mirror short, activated after +1*ATR

notes: Replaces the failed Asia-London XAUUSD session-breakout concept with a simpler, symbol-agnostic Donchian+ATR framework on GER40 European hours. No brittle tz-dependent session range computation.
